name: a11y-assist
description: a11y-assist — accessibility tooling that aggregates W3C sources into one core, served to AI agents (MCP server) and developers (website).

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=act-rules-query && npm run build --workspace=apg-query && npm run build --workspace=wcag-query && npm run build --workspace=a11y-assist-core && npm run build --workspace=a11y-assist-mcp
scripts.docs:app: npm run build:web && cp packages/web/dist/index.html docs/app/index.html
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=act-rules-query && npm run build --workspace=apg-query && npm run build --workspace=wcag-query && npm run build --workspace=a11y-assist-core && npm run typecheck --workspace=a11y-assist-mcp && npm run typecheck --workspace=a11y-assist-web
scripts.extract: npm run extract --workspace=apg-query && npm run extract --workspace=wcag-query && npm run load --workspace=act-rules-query
